package rulefixtures

// scenario for hmac_new_in_loop: `hmac.New(...)` inside loops.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule602NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario602Negative(records []Rule602NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
